seo.title: Care Staffing Agency London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: London's trusted care staffing agency — qualified, vetted Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners for care homes and supported living. Fast response, CQC-compliant.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners to care providers across Greater London.
fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency in London
fields.image_alt: Care staffing agency team of healthcare assistants and support workers in London

fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing is a care staffing agency supplying vetted care-sector workers to providers across Greater London. From a single shift to ongoing cover, we help care homes and other providers keep their rotas safely staffed. We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners, matching each request to workers who are DBS-checked, referenced, and directly employed. Whether you need planned cover, short-notice help, or support while you recruit, we can supply reliable staff. We supply workers rather than operate regulated care, so our focus is entirely on finding you dependable, well-vetted people and responding promptly whenever you get in touch.
fields.heading: Reliable care staffing across Greater London

items.body: Every worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement, so you can book with confidence.
items.title: Fully Vetted Staff

items.body: When a shift falls through, we work quickly to supply a suitable vetted worker from our Greater London pool.
items.title: Rapid Short-Notice Cover

items.body: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners, matching the role to your requirement.
items.title: Broad Role Coverage

items.body: Our workers are directly employed, which helps us keep their training, documentation, and standards consistent.
items.title: Directly Employed Workers

items.body: Our workers are based across Greater London, helping us reach your service and supply staff familiar with local settings.
items.title: Greater London Reach

items.body: We follow up promptly on staffing requests and keep you updated throughout the placement.
items.title: Responsive Communication

fields.body: Safer staffing starts with thorough vetting. Before any worker is placed, we complete enhanced DBS checks, verify their right to work, and take up references from previous care employers. We assess relevant skills for the role, and because our workers are directly employed we keep their training and records current. Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process, giving providers clear, documented assurance about the people supporting their service.
fields.heading: Our vetting and compliance process
fields.image_alt: Care staffing agency worker supporting a resident in a London care home

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners to care providers across Greater London, for temporary, short-notice, and ongoing cover.
items.q: What roles does Vigil Care Staffing supply?

items.a: Every worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement, with relevant skills assessed for the role.
items.q: How are your care workers vetted?

items.a: We supply care-sector workers to providers across Greater London and can discuss the specific area you need covered.
Yes. We prioritise urgent requests and work to supply a suitable vetted worker as quickly as we can.
items.q: Can you help with short-notice cover?

items.a: No. Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted care-sector workers to providers. We are not a regulated care provider and are not CQC-registered.
items.q: Are you a CQC-registered care provider?
